common

Types

Ktx2LevelInfo = object
  byteOffset*: int
  byteLength*: int
  uncompressedByteLength*: int
Source   Edit   
Ktx2TextureInfo = object
  vkFormat*: uint32
  glInternalFormat*: GLenum
  width*: int
  height*: int
  depth*: int
  layerCount*: int
  faceCount*: int
  levelCount*: int
  supercompressionScheme*: uint32
  levels*: seq[Ktx2LevelInfo]
